adjusted.reasoning: Coin-flip SF2 with England a whisker ahead: market ENG +155-175 / X +180-210 / ARG +195-205 (de-vig ~37/30/33), ENG -135 to advance. Model has ARG 56% but Elo hasn't priced England's ET grind vs Norway or Argentina's reliance on late comebacks in 3 straight knockouts; market track leads all tournament -> anchored to market. Both sides came through AET so rest is equal. Messi leads boot race (8) and is +135 anytime. Low-scoring expected; predicted 1-0 England.

posted_to.note: SF2 matchday bet. PROTECT (rank 1/34, lead +9; Stef champion pick dead post-SF1, worst-case bonus floor +5). EP-max 1:0 (EP 1.74 on adjusted 37/30/33); also fades Stef's projected ARG 1:2. Elo model had ARG 56% - overridden by market anchor per tournament-long calibration.
